metadata.description: Accuracy-focused multi-system emulator used by Semu for macOS Nintendo 64

doc.source: The v148 release archive, full 40-character tag revision, recursive archive hash, and archive identity file are all pinned. Nix verifies the embedded tag and revision prefix before configuration.
doc.input: The source patch contains no Semu-specific Start+Select handling. Quit remains a normal declared ares hotkey; platform-level chord supervision is outside the emulator ABI integration.
doc.platforms: This slice is macOS-only and compiles only the upstream n64 core. Linux and Steam Deck N64 continue to use the separately accepted RetroArch path.
doc.rendering: The OpenGL output path calls the directly linked renderer game phase after the final game texture reaches the default framebuffer. VideoCGL calls the post-UI phase on the same frame immediately before flushBuffer. Native hiro settings and menus are separate views, no inactive report exists, and ares owns no Semu composition policy.
